steps.title: Apply the definition
steps.content: A species is classified as tall when its typical height is more than 100 centimeters: $h > 100$.

steps.title: Test the choices
steps.content:
Among $14$, $41$, $78$, and $107$, only $107 > 100$ — the others fall below the cutoff.

So the only height consistent with the tall classification is $h = 107$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
